name: Do I need a lawyer for my workplace sprained ankle claim or can I handle it myself?
description: Not always, but yes if denied or complicated.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my workplace sprained ankle claim or can I handle it myself?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not always, but yes if denied or complicated.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: You can start without one, but a lawyer is crucial if denied, disputed, or complex like permanent disability.[2] Industrial Accidents Division offers info but no legal advice.[1] Key factors: Claims Resolution Conference for disputes; free consultations common.[1] File your claim first, then consult if employer delays benefits or questions injury.[2] Expert help often increases settlements significantly.[2]
